stemHtml: An aircraft is moving on the apron. What marking is used to warn the pilot that the shoulders of the surface are non-load-bearing?

options.a: A pair of solid lines in the same colour as the taxiway centre line marking.
options.b: One solid line in the same colour as the runway centre line marking.
options.c: One solid line in the same colour as the taxiway centre line marking.
options.d: A pair of solid lines in the same colour as the runway centre line marking.
